title: S3 Basic Bucket Configuration
description: Configuration for creating a basic S3 bucket

bucketName.title: Bucket Name
bucketName.description: Name for the S3 bucket (must be globally unique)

region.title: AWS Region
region.description: AWS region where the bucket will be created

enableVersioning.title: Enable Versioning
enableVersioning.description: Enable versioning to keep multiple versions of objects

lifecycleDays.title: Lifecycle Days
lifecycleDays.description: Number of days before objects are deleted (0 to disable)
